MINI MINUTES:

The Court hearing no objections takes this matter under submission with the intent to grant. Ms. La confirms that the creditor claim for Robert Baldwin is settled.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Continued To Apr-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions And To Approve Settlement Of Litigation And Allow Payment By Executor
Off Calendar Aug-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La for Karen Fitzpatrick (executor).

The court stated that it read the papers and noted that no one appeared to object. The Petition for Instructions and to Approve Settlement of Litigation and Allow Payment by Executor is under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Trang La, Esq., for and with Karen Fitzpatrick, Petitioner, both in person.
Anthony Chiosso, Esq., via Zoom videoconference, for Robert Baldwin, Creditor.

At the outset, Mr. Chiosso confirms and states his client's objection to the instant petition. The court acknowledges the objection. Mr. Chiosso's objection is overruled in open court. The Court then granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Aug-28-2018 and codicil dated Mar-23-2023 are admitted to probate. Karen Fitzpatrick is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $2,800,000. Amy Harrington is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-24-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Continued To Feb-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trang La for and with Karen Fitzpatrick.

The court noted that Thomas Portell is not present and that he filed objections on behalf of Robert Baldwin. Mrs. La stated that she spoke with Mr. Portell, that she does not know why Mr. Baldwin filed an objection when he is a creditor, that she asked him to withdraw his objections and that he asked that they settle the claim in the future. The court informed Mrs. La that the amended petition needs to be noticed, that re-publication is required and asked if the special letters need to be extended. The court also informed the parties that its current thinking is to use the type written will as the will, and to use the handwritten as a codicil. Mrs. La asked the court to extend the special letters with general authority. The court informed Mrs. La that cannot expand authority on an oral request and that it needs to follow the probate code. The Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed is continued to February 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice of the amended petition and for re-publication. If Mrs. La does not have a firm handle on the defects that need to be corrected, she is to reach out to the probate examiner. Mrs. La is also to e-mail the request to extend the special letters to the examiner.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Continued To Jan-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Trang La appeared via zoom for and with Karen Fitzpatrick (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding admitting both wills together, that Karen Fitzpatrick be the administrator with will annexed, that she will provide a bond for $2,700,000.00, and that counsel to clear up all procedural issues. The matter is continued to January 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court extends powers of special administrator to Karen Fitzpatrick until the next hearing date on January 22, 2024.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
